locations.name: Lionel Dietrichsen
locations.summary: Lionel Lorenzo Dietrichsen (1806–1846) was an English ornithologist who operated as a merchant at Oxford Street.

locations.name: Mallee bioregion
locations.summary: Mallee, also known as Roe Botanical District, is a biogeographic region in southern Western Australia.

locations.name: 澳大利亚
locations.summary: 澳大利亚联邦（英語：Commonwealth of Australia），通称澳大利亚、澳洲（Australia，缩写为AU、AUS），是一个位于南半球中北部、東半球东部的議會制君主立憲制、聯邦制國家。全国整体属于大洋洲（並非自成一洲），…

locations.name: 艾爾半島
locations.summary: 艾爾半島（英語：Eyre Peninsula）為一個位於澳大利亞南部南澳大利亞州的三角半島，距離南澳首府城市阿德萊德700多公里。 半島東臨斯潘塞灣，北靠高勒山脈，而西邊則是大澳大利亞灣（Great Australian Bight）。早…

locations.name: Gawler Ranges
locations.summary: The Gawler Ranges are a range of stoney hills in South Australia to the north of the Eyre Peninsula.

locations.name: 弗林德斯山脈
locations.summary: 弗林德斯山脈（Flinders Ranges）是南澳大利亞州最大的山脈。弗林德斯山脈起始於阿德萊德以北約200 km（125 mi）處，山脈全長430 km（265 mi）。最高峰聖瑪麗峰高1,171米（3,842英尺）。弗林德斯山脈的部…

locations.name: 維多利亞州
locations.summary: 维多利亚州（英語：Victoria，缩写为VIC），简称維州、維省，又譯域多利省，是澳大利亞東岸南部的一个州，是澳洲大陸本土五个联邦州中幅員最小的（僅237629平方公里），但人口卻為澳洲第二多（接近670万，僅次於新南威爾斯州），人口密…

locations.name: East Gippsland
locations.summary: East Gippsland is the eastern region of Gippsland, Victoria, Australia covering 31,740 km2 (12,250 sq mi) (14%) of Vict…

locations.name: 袋鼠島
locations.summary: 袋鼠島（英語：Kangaroo Island），又译坎加鲁岛，是澳洲繼塔斯曼尼亞及梅爾維爾島之後的第三大島嶼，面積約4,405平方公里。袋鼠島位處聖文森特灣的入口，距離南澳州的首府阿德萊德西南112公里。島上距離大陸最近的位置離弗勒里厄半…

locations.name: 塔斯馬尼亞州
locations.summary: 塔斯馬尼亞州（Tasmania，發音：/tæzˈmeɪniə/；帕拉瓦卡尼語：Lutruwita），簡稱塔州，是澳大利亞唯一的島嶼州，原名范迪門地（Van Diemen's Land，又譯萬迪門蘭）。該州位於澳大利亞大陸東南方約240公里…

locations.name: The Australian Bird Guide
locations.summary: The Australian Bird Guide (The Guide) was published by CSIRO Publishing in 2017.

relations.subject: Purple-crowned lorikeet
relations.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Glossopsitta porphyrocephala |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22684658A254009173 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22684658A254009173.en |access-date=26 June 2025}} | taxon = Psitteuteles porphyrocephalus | authority = (Dietrichsen, 1837) | range_map = Purple-crowned Lorikeet.png | range_map_caption = Distribution of the purple-crowned lorikeet | synonyms = * Glossopsitta porphyrocephala * Parvipsitta porphyrocephala }} The purple-crowned lorikeet (Psitteuteles porphyrocephalus), (also known as the porphyry-crowned lorikeet, zit parrot, blue-crowned lorikeet, purple-capped lorikeet, lory, cowara, lorikeet, and purple-capped parakeet) is a lorikeet found in scrub and mallee of southern Australia

relations.subject: Purple-crowned lorikeet
relations.evidence: The purple-crowned lorikeet is found in southwest Western Australia, and in southern South Australia, east from the southern Eyre Peninsula, through the Gawler Ranges and southern Flinders Ranges and across Victoria to East Gippsland

relations.subject: Purple-crowned lorikeet
relations.evidence: It is also found on Kangaroo Island, but is not found in Tasmania. It is the only native lorikeet found in Western Australia. Locally nomadic, it is often found in dry sclerophyll forest and town parks and gardens, especially where Eucalyptus trees are flowering
